title: Free Walking Tour Tips - Quick Summary
items: **For a good 2 hours free walking tour in Berlin, EUR 10 per person is the minimum fair tip.**
**EUR 15 is a strong thank-you** when the guide made Berlin click for you or the tour was clearly above average.
**EUR 20+ is generous** when the guide made Berlin click for you or the tour was a highlight of the trip.
**Cash is easiest at the end of the walk,** because not every guide has a card reader or mobile payment setup.
**A free walking tour is tip-based, not guide-works-for-free:** there is no upfront price, but the guide is paid by guests at the end.
